description: Create a hillshade relief map from the SRTM DEM located at /home/ga/snap_data/srtm_dem.tif. Compute the horizontal (dz/dx) and vertical (dz/dy) gradients to derive slope (atan(sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy))) and aspect (atan2(dy, dx)) bands in radians. Calculate the hillshade band using a sun azimuth of 315° and sun elevation of 45° (zenith = 45°) using the standard hillshade illumination formula: cos(zenith_rad) * cos(slope) + sin(zenith_rad) * sin(slope) * cos(azimuth_rad - aspect). Save the product containing the gradient, slope, aspect, and hillshade bands in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/hillshade_product and export the hillshade relief as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/hillshade_relief.tif.
